description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Special Train Service Arrangements for Lunar New Year
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 新春列車服務特別安排

2025-01-29T06:35:00.CONTENT_EN: Enhanced train services for Lunar New Year To make passenger's travel more convenient during the festive season, MTR have increased the train frequency on all lines (except Airport Express) at various times until 4 February. 30 January • Train frequencies will be enhanced at various times on the Kwun Tong Line, Tsuen Wan Line, Island Line, South Island Line, Tuen Ma Line, East Rail Line and Tung Chung Line 31 January – 2 February • The last Airport Express will depart from AsiaWorld-Expo Station at 1:00 am the next day Please refer to MTR's website for more information.
2025-01-29T06:35:00.CONTENT_CN: 新春列車服務特別安排 為方便乘客新春期間出行，本地鐵路綫（機場快綫除外）於不同時段加密列車班次，直至2月4日。 年初二（1月30日）​ 觀塘綫、荃灣綫、港島綫、南港島綫、屯馬綫、東鐵綫及東涌綫於不同時段加密班次 年初三至五（1月31至2月2日）​ 機場快綫博覽館站尾班車延至翌日01:00開出 詳情請參閱港鐵網頁。

2025-01-31T08:07:00.CONTENT_EN:
Enhanced train services for Lunar New Year

To make passenger's travel more convenient during the festive season, MTR have increased the train frequency on all lines (except Airport Express) at various times until 4 February. 

31 January – 2 February

• The last Airport Express will depart from AsiaWorld-Expo Station at 1:00 am the next day

Please refer to MTR's website for more information.
2025-01-31T08:07:00.CONTENT_CN:
新春列車服務特別安排

為方便乘客新春期間出行，本地鐵路綫（機場快綫除外）於不同時段加密列車班次，直至2月4日。

年初三至五（1月31至2月2日）​

• 機場快綫博覽館站尾班車延至翌日01:00開出

詳情請參閱港鐵網頁。

2025-02-03T06:04:00.CONTENT_EN: Enhanced train services for Lunar New Year To make passenger's travel more convenient during the festive season, MTR have increased the train frequency on all lines (except Airport Express) at various times until 4 February. Please refer to MTR's website for more information.
2025-02-03T06:04:00.CONTENT_CN: 新春列車服務特別安排 為方便乘客新春期間出行，本地鐵路綫（機場快綫除外）於不同時段加密列車班次，直至2月4日。 詳情請參閱港鐵網頁。

description.LOCATION_EN: Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge Hong Kong Link Road
description.LOCATION_CN: 港珠澳大橋香港連接路

2025-02-03T06:20:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to high wind , the following special traffic and transport arrangements have been implemented on Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge Hong Kong Link Road (HZMB HKLR), with details as shown below: The speed limit of the HZMB HKLR is lowered from 100 km/h to 50 km/h.
2025-02-03T06:20:00.CONTENT_CN: 由於強風，港珠澳大橋香港連接路已實施以下特別交通及運輸安排： 港珠澳大橋香港連接路的最高車速限制由每小時100 公里降低至每小時50 公里。

2025-02-03T08:35:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to improved weather condition, the following arrangements have been implemented on Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge Hong Kong Link Road (HZMB HKLR): The speed limit of the HZMB HKLR resumes to 100 km/h.

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Crowd Management at Kai Tak and Sung Wong Toi stations
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 啟德及宋皇臺站客流管理

One-way passenger flow will be implemented at specific entrances and exits. After the event, there may be additional waiting time to enter the station as passengers will enter in groups.

運輸署接獲港鐵公司通知，由於有工程車在太和站附近出現設備故障，東鐵綫列車服務作出以下調整:

東鐵綫服務更改如下:

金鐘站↔火炭站:每4-8分鐘一班

火炭站↔大埔墟站:每8分鐘一班

大埔墟站↔羅湖站:每16分鐘一班

上水站↔落馬洲站:每20分鐘一班

前往落馬洲站的乘客，請於上水站1號月台轉車。

請考慮使用其他交通工具，現時東鐵綫個別車站將實施客流管理措施。  運輸署及巴士公司現正密切監察巴士乘客需求，巴士公司已適當加強巴士服務應付乘客需求，包括九巴第270A、978號線及城巴第79號線。

2025-02-05T10:52:00.CONTENT_EN:
Transport Department has received notification from MTR Corporation Limited that Due to an equipment fault on an Engineer's train near Tai Wo Station, the East Rail Line train service is adjusted as follows:

Admiralty Station ↔ Fo Tan Station: 4-8-minute intervals
Fo Tan Station ↔ Tai Po Market Station: 8-minute intervals
Tai Po Market Station ↔ Lo Wu Station : 16-minute intervals
Sheung Shui Station ↔ Lok Ma Chau Station: 20-minute intervals

Passengers for Lok Ma Chau Station, please interchange at Platform 1 of Sheung Shui Station. 

Please consider using other transport. Crowd management measures will be in place in specific stations at East Rail Line.   Transport Department and bus companies are closely monitoring bus passenger demand, and the bus companies have already strengthened the bus services accordingly, including KMB Rt. 270A, Rt. 978 and CTB Rt. 79, Rt. B8.
